name: onset-occasional-habits
text: I have trouble falling asleep some nights, usually after too much coffee in the afternoon.

name: maintenance-and-early-waking
text: I keep waking up through the night and then far too early, most weeks.

name: anxious-mind-routes-anxiety-hub
text: my mind races at night, I feel anxious and just can't switch off.

name: shift-work-jetlag
text: I work night shifts and my sleep schedule is all over the place.

name: tried-remedy-routes-to-its-page
text: I've tried melatonin and it didn't really help me fall asleep.

name: invented-remedy-name-dropped-not-routed
text: someone told me to try dreamzzz gummies for sleep, not sure about them.

name: chronic-surfaces-cbti-and-clinician
text: I've had trouble sleeping most nights for months now, it never lets up.

name: pregnancy-screener-safety-first
text: I'm expecting a baby and struggling to fall asleep, what pages should I read?

name: child-screener-safety-first
text: my kid keeps waking up at night, where should I read about this?

name: prescription-med-routes-meds-first
text: I take a daily prescription for my blood pressure and I sleep badly.

name: diagnosed-condition-safety-and-cbti
text: my clinician treats me for an ongoing health condition and my sleep is poor most nights.

name: crisis-via-extraction-shortcircuits
text: honestly I don't want to be here anymore and I can't sleep at all

name: empty-extraction-fallback
text: I'm just tired all the time and not sure what to do about my sleep.

name: model-error-degrades
text: I can't fall asleep at night and want to read something useful.
